body:
"Details

The Environment Agency has received a substantial variation application for an environmental permit under the Environmental Permitting (England and Wales) Regulations 2016.

We are now consulting on the proposed decision.


  
    Applicant name: Valencia Waste Management Limited
  
  
    Reference number: EPR/BS7951IB/V019
  
  
    Proposed change for a variation: Valencia Waste Management Ltd is seeking to vary their existing permit for Pilsworth South Landfill site to include a Section 5.4 (b)(ii) - non-hazardous waste installation - pre-treatment for incineration and co-incineration activity and a physical treatment of non-hazardous waste activity for the purposes of operating a new Materials Recycling Facility.
  
  
    Application type: Substantial Variation
  
  
    Address: Pilsworth South Landfill, Pilsworth Road, Bury, BL9 8QZ
  
  
    Local authority: Bury Council
  


Information available for consultation in Citizen Space, our online consultation hub


  
    Draft draft variation notice
  
  
    Draft decision document
  


How to view and comment on the draft decision

End date for representations: 04 July 2025.

You can comment:

Online: https://consult.environment-agency.gov.uk/psc/bl9-8qz-valencia-waste-management-limited-epr-bs79/

Via email:pscpublicresponse@environment-agency.gov.uk

For advice about how to make a representation or if you are unable to make a representation via e-mail please call 03708 506 506.

The Environment Agency will normally put any comments it receives on the public register. This includes your name but not your personal contact details. Please tell us if you do not want your response to be public.

The privacy notice for permit applicants/operators can be viewed at Privacy Notice
"
